query:
-- Adicionar colunas faltantes na tabela notifications
ALTER TABLE `notifications`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `relatedProtocolId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `nup` varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL;

-- Corrigir o enum type para incluir os novos valores
ALTER TABLE `notifications`
  MODIFY COLUMN `type` enum('new_message','ticket_assigned','ticket_resolved','queue_assigned','mention','protocol_update','tramitation','signature_request') NOT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user rskERJxqepVxgiV.root --database fNE9efXdCmnppeWra27xJs --execute -- Adicionar colunas faltantes na tabela notifications
ALTER TABLE `notifications`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `relatedProtocolId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `nup` varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL;

-- Corrigir o enum type para incluir os novos valores
ALTER TABLE `notifications`
  MODIFY COLUMN `type` enum('new_message','ticket_assigned','ticket_resolved','queue_assigned','mention','protocol_update','tramitation','signature_request') NOT NULL;
